クラス RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory

java.lang.Object
mechanics.rl.RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory
public final class RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory extends Object
Creates the fixed Raiden/Xingqiu/Xiangling/Bennett simulator used by multi-party RL.
